AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp recruit
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: After finishing her student years, [PAWN_nameDef] successfully passed the military entrance exam and voluntarily enlisted as a soldier in the Wolfein MegaCorp. [PAWN_nameDef] always maintained a positive attitude, full of creativity, and excelled at finding innovative solutions to problems in high-pressure environments.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp recruit
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: Upon learning that it was the ResistanceArmy who carried out the terrorist attack in the city, [PAWN_nameDef] was filled with intense rage. With her passionate nature, she enlisted without hesitation and became a soldier in the MegaCorp, secretly vowing to drive these rebels out of their homeland

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp recruit
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: Feeling lost about her future, [PAWN_nameDef] enlisted in the military on the recommendation of others. Living alongside fellow recruits helped her gradually find clarity in her path forward.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp soldier
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a member of the Wolfein Task Force, assigned to the fringes to carry out security duties for the Wolfein colonies, defending against the ResistanceArmy. [PAWN_nameDef] hopes that, once the civil war ends, she will be able to return to her family and live a peaceful life.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp soldier
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is part of the Wolfein Task Force, and the constant battles against the resistance have left her mentally and physically exhausted. [PAWN_nameDef] finds herself questioning the reason for her fight—why, as members of the same race, must they engage in such mutual destruction?

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp soldier
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a member of the Wolfein Task Force, harboring deep hatred for the terrorist organization known as the resistance. With each successive terrorist attack in the city, [PAWN_nameDef]'s resolve to oppose the resistance grows even stronger.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp soldier
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a member of the Wolfein Task Force, and over time, she has lost the passion and ambition she once had. After countless battles, [PAWN_nameDef] has become numb, choosing to abandon further thought—she only needs to follow her superiors' orders without question.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp soldier
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a member of the Wolfein Task Force, fully aware that the resistance was born to oppose the oppression of the lower classes by the Wolfein MegaCorp. However, when the actions of the resistance strayed from their original purpose, [PAWN_nameDef] realized that the resistance had become her enemy.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp soldier
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a member of the Wolfein Task Force and has served in the military for many years. There are rumors that she once fought in the war against the Mechanoids and survived. Now, she is a seasoned veteran with extensive combat experience. Her journey has given her a profound understanding of organization and discipline, but it has also made her more cautious and vigilant, holding a reserved stance on how to resolve conflicts.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp soldier
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a member of the Wolfein Task Force, and within the military, [PAWN_nameDef] operates like a cold, emotionless machine. No matter what task is assigned by the higher-ups, [PAWN_nameDef] accepts it without complaint. Whether it’s killing the enemy or being killed, [PAWN_nameDef] is mentally prepared for either outcome.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp soldier
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a member of the Wolfein Task Force, previously handling security-related matters. Amid the increasingly tense social environment, [PAWN_nameDef] was reassigned to the more dangerous and desolate Fringe Worlds, tasked with protecting the colonies of the Wolfein MegaCorp.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp guard
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a member of a security detail within the Wolfein MegaCorp, responsible for escorting and transporting key personnel, critical cargo, and sensitive information. In the tense backdrop of the ongoing civil war, [PAWN_nameDef]'s duties have become all the more crucial.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp scout
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a member of the Wolfein MegaCorp's scout squad. As the vanguard of the unit, [PAWN_nameDef]'s duties include, but are not limited to, reconnaissance, sabotage, and gathering military intelligence. With her calm and decisive nature, as well as a keen awareness of environmental changes, [PAWN_nameDef] has become an excellent scout.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp surgeon
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] serves as a military doctor within the Wolfein MegaCorp, having joined as a field medic with the intent of saving more lives on the frontlines. However, on the battlefield, [PAWN_nameDef] came to understand that in order to save one life, sometimes another must be ended.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp sniper
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a sniper in a squad within the Wolfein MegaCorp, possessing extraordinary skills and a high level of professionalism. Even in extreme environments, [PAWN_nameDef] can maintain precise shooting. One bullet, one enemy—this is the result of [PAWN_nameDef]'s hard-earned training.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp support
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] serves as a support soldier in a squad within the Wolfein MegaCorp. Wolfein support soldiers typically wear heavy armor and carry high-powered, sustained weapons to provide powerful fire support for their teammates. [PAWN_nameDef] is always the strongest pillar in the squad.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp vanguard
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a member of the Wolfein MegaCorp's Vanguard Squad. The members of the Vanguard are typically composed of melee units who have undergone specialized combat training. [PAWN_nameDef] was promoted to this elite squad due to her outstanding combat abilities and went on to achieve remarkable feats in several subsequent battles.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp mechanic
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a combat mechanic in the Wolven military corporation. Due to the scarce population of the Wolven species, the actual number of Wolven soldiers in the military is significantly insufficient. As a result, the corporation makes extensive use of autonomous combat units within its military forces to compensate for this shortfall. After all, the cost of training a professional Wolven soldier far exceeds that of producing and maintaining autonomous machinery. Within the squad, [PAWN_nameDef]'s role is to command, calibrate, and maintain these autonomous combat machines.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp hacker
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has constantly tried to explain to those around her in the squad that she is not a hacker, but rather an "electronic warfare and intelligence acquisition specialist." Compared to other soldiers, [PAWN_nameDef] is not particularly skilled in combat, but her role in supporting combat is indispensable.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp psionic warlock
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] holds a unique position within the Wolfein MegaCorp. Only a select few in the military are capable of using psychic powers in combat, and their role in battle is not to be underestimated. [PAWN_nameDef] was born with powerful psychic abilities and, upon reaching adulthood, was recruited into the MegaCorp as a psychic sorcerer.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp "red-cap"team member
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] comes from a mysterious special forces squad within the MegaCorp, known as the "Red Hats." This elite squad is responsible for handling covert operations such as infiltration, assassination, intelligence theft, and sabotage. The distinctive red uniforms and hoods are the most obvious symbols of the "Red Hats." No one would dare to make an enemy of such a mysterious and formidable elite special forces unit.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp Trader
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a trade representative assigned to the frontlines by the MegaCorp’s trade department. She is responsible for negotiating material exchanges with local military forces and other colonies to secure the company's maximum profit. At the same time, [PAWN_nameDef] must also gather firsthand battlefield intelligence to support corporate decision-making.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp Clerk
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] successfully joined the administrative department of the MegaCorp through professional training and evaluation. As a civilian staff member responsible for administrative affairs, [PAWN_nameDef] handles various tedious paperwork and coordinates tasks between different departments.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp Clerk
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is part of the logistics department within the Wolfein MegaCorp, responsible for the procurement and storage of military supplies. [PAWN_nameDef] must constantly monitor changes in battlefield demands and adjust procurement plans accordingly to ensure the availability of critical supplies.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp Clerk
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a member of the financial department within the Wolfein MegaCorp, responsible for managing the company’s financial accounts and taxes. [PAWN_nameDef] conducts thorough audits across various departments and writes detailed audit reports, but this has led to making quite a few enemies.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp Clerk
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a personnel officer in the human resources department of the Wolfein MegaCorp, primarily responsible for employee recruitment, allocation, and management training.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp Clerk
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is the core coordinator of the logistics support department within the MegaCorp, overseeing all internal logistics affairs. From meal provisions to employee accommodations, everything falls under [PAWN_nameDef]'s management.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp Clerk
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a professional in the records management department of the Wolfein MegaCorp, responsible for classifying and archiving various important documents and materials within the company, as well as managing them digitally.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp Clerk
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a senior consultant in the legal department of the Wolfein MegaCorp, responsible for handling various legal matters and safeguarding the company's interests.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp Armed Clerk
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is an elite employee of the Wolfein MegaCorp. Although [PAWN_nameDef] does not come from a military background, to carry out certain fieldwork that requires the use of "force," [PAWN_nameDef] has undergone rigorous combat training and is equipped with basic weaponry.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp Armed Clerk
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: Although [PAWN_nameDef]'s primary duties are administrative and managerial, [PAWN_nameDef] has also undergone basic combat training and can quickly arm herself when necessary to assist the MegaCorp's task force in missions that require the intervention of "hard power."

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp Armed Clerk
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is an elite employee of the Wolfein MegaCorp, primarily responsible for the security of high-ranking personnel within the company. After training, [PAWN_nameDef] has mastered various tactical skills and the use of weapons.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp Armed Clerk
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a senior purging officer in an internal special department. Although [PAWN_nameDef] does not have a military or police background, through professional training and years of accumulated experience, she has become a nightmare for anyone disloyal to the company.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Mega Corp Regional Supervisor
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is the overall head of all business operations for the MegaCorp in the region. To handle a workload far beyond what an average person can bear, the MegaCorp provided [PAWN_nameDef] with extensive additional training and the use of pharmaceuticals, enabling her to perform in this role.
